overall.description: Third-person game engine footage transitioning from planetary surface exploration to orbital space flight. An astronaut in a spacesuit traverses a rocky desert landscape with a massive gas giant visible in the sky, followed by a cut to a spacecraft drifting in orbit above the planet with a distant moon visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien desert wasteland with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: astronaut in spacesuit walking steadily across cracked rocky terrain toward the horizon

entered.detail: massive pale planet with visible atmospheric bands dominating the sky
jagged rocky outcrop rising prominently from the desert floor
loose stones and boulders strewn across the cracked desert ground
hazy mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon beneath the gas giant

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a barren alien desert landscape under a hazy sky. The player character, wearing a detailed spacesuit, walks forward across cracked rocky terrain scattered with boulders. A massive gas giant planet hangs in the sky above distant mountain silhouettes, creating a sense of isolation and scale.

scene_state.functional_zone: planetary orbit with spacecraft and celestial bodies

events.description: fade from planet surface to orbital view of spacecraft above the desert world
large moon becomes visible in the upper right background against the nebula

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft in stable orbit above the desert planet, observing the surface and surrounding celestial bodies

entered.detail: gray tactical spacecraft with angular wings and glowing blue thrusters floating in orbit
curved horizon of the desert planet viewed from orbit with visible terrain features
thin blue atmospheric glow along the planet's curved horizon
diffuse reddish-brown gas clouds in deep space behind the spacecraft
large spherical moon with cratered surface visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the scene shifts to a spacecraft drifting in planetary orbit. The camera orbits slowly around the gray tactical ship, showing the curved desert planet below with its thin atmospheric glow. Diffuse nebula clouds fill the background, and a large cratered moon becomes visible in the distance as the camera pans.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from the desolate surface of an alien world to the silent expanse of planetary orbit. It begins on a barren desert landscape where a spacesuited figure treks across cracked rocky terrain and boulders under a hazy sky dominated by a massive gas giant. As the perspective shifts away from the mountain silhouettes, the scene fades and expands into the void of space, centering on a gray tactical spacecraft drifting in orbit. The camera then orbits slowly around the vessel, revealing the curved glow of the planet's atmosphere below against a backdrop of diffuse nebula clouds. Finally, the view pans outward to reveal a large cratered moon hanging in the distant reaches of the star system.
